id.description: Unique identifier for this app (used internally by daemon/shell)

display_name.description: Human-readable name shown in app drawer

icon_path.description: Absolute path to app icon PNG file

backend.description: Which OS backend this app runs on

launch_target.description: Backend-specific launch command or identifier. Format depends on backend: linux: shell command (e.g. 'firefox'), windows: absolute path to .exe (e.g. 'C:\\Program Files\\App\\app.exe'), android: Android package name (e.g. 'com.spotify.music')

needs_network.description: Whether this app requires internet access. If true, daemon enables network access for the backend when launching.
